title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese describes building a $481k/year product using Claude Code, a code generation tool, in 45 days with zero coding experience. The video covers five steps for rapid product development: starting with the problem, engineering critical paths strategically, learning terminology to communicate with the tool, methodical building processes, and identifying fragile systems before launch.
